entries.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entries.description: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown

entries.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entries.description: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery

entries.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entries.description: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh

entries.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
entries.description: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower

entries.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entries.description: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron

entries.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entries.description: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert

entries.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entries.description: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps

entries.title: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entries.description: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis

entries.title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entries.description: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius

entries.title: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entries.description: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain

entries.title: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entries.description: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie

entries.title: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entries.description: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell

entries.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entries.description: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin

entries.title: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entries.description: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson

entries.title: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entries.description: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc

entries.title: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entries.description: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann

entries.title: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entries.description: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton

entries.title: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entries.description: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger

entries.title: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty

entries.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz

entries.title: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entries.description: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson

entries.title: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entries.description: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman

entries.title: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein

entries.title: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey

entries.title: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell

entries.title: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entries.description: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros

entries.title: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entries.description: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson

entries.title: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morr

entries.title: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill

entries.title: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau

entries.title: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
entries.description: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown

entries.title: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
entries.description: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra

entries.title: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
entries.description: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso

entries.title: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to
entries.description: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to be superior to them. The Teachers told us so, and they frowned when they looked at us. - Ayn Rand

entries.title: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld
entries.description: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld

entries.title: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin
entries.description: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin

entries.title: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm
entries.description: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm

entries.title: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman
entries.description: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman

entries.title: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun
entries.description: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun

entries.title: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets
entries.description: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets

entries.title: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip
entries.description: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip of beer. They both stood there looking at each other in thought. - Daniel Amory

entries.title: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray
entries.description: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray

entries.title: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law
entries.description: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law

entries.title: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor
entries.description: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor

entries.title: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay
entries.description: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay

entries.title: Anybody with ability can play in the big leagues. But to be able to trick people year in and year out the way I did, I think that was a much greater feat. - Bob Uecker

entries.title: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee
entries.description: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee

entries.title: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis
entries.description: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis

entries.description: The real winners in life are the people who look at every situation with an expectation that they can make it work or make it better - Barbara Pletcher

entries.title: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper
entries.description: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper

entries.title: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood
entries.description: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood

entries.title: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith
entries.description: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith

entries.title: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight
entries.description: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight

entries.description: One night she told me to put out the garbage. I told her you cooked it, you take it out. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman
entries.description: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman

entries.title: The purpose of school should not be to prepare students for more school. We should be seeking to have fully engaged students now. - Donalyn Miller

entries.title: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill
entries.description: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill

entries.title: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso
entries.description: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso

entries.description: Stand by your man. Give him two arms to cling to and something warm to come to. - Tammy Wynette

entries.title: Black people dominate sports in the United States. 20% of the population and 90% of the final four. We own this shit. Basketball, baseball, football, golf, tennis, and as soon as they make a heated hockey rink we'll take that shit too. - Chris Rock

entries.description: Why her cooking is so bad that the flies pitched in to fix the screen door. I leave dental floss in the kitchen and watch the roaches hang themselves. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola
entries.description: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola

entries.description: Life is not an exact science, it is an art. - Samuel  Butler

entries.description: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia. - Judith Viorst

entries.description: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic. - Ambrose Bierce

entries.title: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams
entries.description: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams

entries.title: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius
entries.description: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius

entries.description: God writes a lot of comedy.. The trouble is, he's stuck with so many bad actors who don't know how to play funny. - Garrison Keillor

entries.title: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time. - Jean  Cocteau

entries.title: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out t
entries.description: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out teachers (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of temper (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of affection (no exceptions), no pets over one ounce or under one ton, and no singing, except in Bulgarian. I began to think Mr Klamp wouldn't be so bad.. - Polly Shulman

entries.title: Matthew 16:15-16
entries.description: ““But what about you?” he asked. “Who do you say I am?”  Simon Peter answered, “You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God.””

entries.title: When it comes to winning, you need the skill and the will. - Frank Tyger
entries.description: When it comes to winning, you need the skill and the will. - Frank Tyger

entries.title: It is inevitable that some defeat will enter even the most victorious life. The human spirit is never finished when it is defeated.. It is finished when it surrenders. - Ben Stein
entries.description: It is inevitable that some defeat will enter even the most victorious life. The human spirit is never finished when it is defeated.. It is finished when it surrenders. - Ben Stein

entries.title: Love means not ever having to say you're sorry. - Erich Segal
entries.description: Love means not ever having to say you're sorry. - Erich Segal

entries.description: A leader is the wave pushed ahead by the ship. - Leo Nikolaevich Tolstoy

entries.description: Bodybuilding is much like any other sport. To be successful, you must dedicate yourself 100% to your training, diet and mental approach. - Arnold Schwarzenegger

entries.title: Boy were we poor, if I wasn't born a boy I would of had nothing to play with. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: Boy were we poor, if I wasn't born a boy I would of had nothing to play with. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: A master in the art of living draws no sharp distinction between his work and his play; his labor and his leisure; his mind and his body; his education & his recreation. He hardly knows which is which. He simply pursues his vision of excellence through whatever he is doing, and leaves others to dete
entries.description: A master in the art of living draws no sharp distinction between his work and his play; his labor and his leisure; his mind and his body; his education & his recreation. He hardly knows which is which. He simply pursues his vision of excellence through whatever he is doing, and leaves others to determine whether he is working or playing. To himself, he always appears to be doing both. - François-René de Chateaubriand

entries.title: Do question, even the basics!You will be a fool for once!If you don't, you will be, for a lifetime. - Himmilicious
entries.description: Do question, even the basics!You will be a fool for once!If you don't, you will be, for a lifetime. - Himmilicious
